title: atocion reuterianum
intro: Atocion reuterianum, also known as Lantana camara, is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Atocion reuterianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Atocion reuterianum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections.
